_meta.source_policy: PDF-derived learning content; story structure and characters are model_inference.

checks.name: source grounding
checks.details: All prompts cite source_pdf refs; Chapter 7 reversible-computation grounding was added.

checks.name: story quality
checks.details: Sessions connect learning gates to team/rival beats.

checks.name: rival school depth
checks.details: Four rival schools have safe public arcs and sealed spoiler details.

checks.name: spoiler control
checks.details: Public scenario and prompt wording were redacted; final result, route, hidden motivations, and decisive details remain sealed.

checks.name: prompt evaluation
checks.details: Answer reveal no longer clears a prompt by itself; prompt-specific open drafts and clean retry are implemented.

checks.name: browser execution
checks.details: In-app browser was unavailable in this session; JavaScript modules and core state/evaluator logic were loaded through the local JS runtime.

checks.name: character consistency
checks.details: One shared generated character sheet anchors base-team appearance; individual variants deferred.

checks.name: Git tracking assumptions
checks.details: .gitignore does not ignore generated/data/sealed/ and source PDFs remain ignored.
